command: did_imputation Y unit t Ei, minn(0) cluster(unit) hetby(group)
error_message: The hetby variable takes too many (over 30) values
root_cause: Stata 14.2 levelsof returns r(levels) but not r(r), while the pinned ado checks r(r)>30.
oracle_command: did_imputation Y unit t Ei, minn(0) cluster(unit) wtr(g0 g1)
